raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rangi/ wiﬀas Pataules
Walditaja Derribas Schkirsts/
eet juhtu Preekschā pahri pahr
to Jardanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad xemmeet preeksch
jums diwipadefimits Wihrus/ no
tahm Israëta Ziltim / no ikwee-
nas Zilts weenu Wibru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad to Preesteru Peh-
das/ kas ta KUNGA / wiﬀas
Pasaules Walditaja Schkirstu
nesē/ Jardanas Uhdeni paduf-
fehs/ tad taps tas Jardanas Uh-
dens pahrdallihts/ prohti tas llh-
dens/ kas no angſchenes noteck/
un stahwehs weenā Kohpā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee Laudis no fa-
weein Dshwokteein zehlahs pahr
to Jardann cet/ tad neﬀe tee Pree-
steri to Derribas Schkirstu to
Lauschu Preekschā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee/ kas to Schkir-
stu neﬀe lihds Jardanai nahze /
un kad tee Preesteri/kas to Schkir-
stu neﬀe/ Mallā Uhdeni eentin-
ne ( Bet ta Jardana bija wiﬀas
fawās Mallās pilna/wiffā Ptan-
chanas Laikā.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad stahweja tas Uhdens/
kas no angſchenes nonahze/ stah-
wu weenā Kohpā/ itt tahtu no ta
Ahdama Pilēfahta/ kas fahnis
Zartana (gull/) bet kas Klajuma
Juhrā/ (prohti) Sahls-Juhra
noskrehe/ istikke wiﬀai; tad gah-
je tee Laudis pahri/ Jerikum
retti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Preesteri/ kas t
KUNGA Derribas Schkirst
nesfe/ stahweja kluffu/ itt pat
Jardanas Widdū fantahi
Kahjahm. Ir wiﬀs Israëts gab
je faufahm Kahjahm vahri / tee-
kams wiﬀi Laudis bij pabeigu
fchi pahr to Jardanu eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta IV. Nodalla.
us Deewa un Josuïs pawehlechānu tohp
Akmini par Peeminneschānu nzelti Gilga
un paschā Jardanas Widdū : 1/2/6/9/
Rubbeira.Gada. un Manassus puss Zilts e
apbruzznoti to Israëla Behrnu Pree-
schā : 12. Tas Jardanas Uhdenus atgreeschah-
atkaf sawā Weetā : 15/18.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N kad wiﬀi Laudis b
pabeigufchi pahr to Jar-
dann eet / tad runnaj-
tas KUNGA us Josuï/ u
fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Neummeetees diwipade-
mits Wihrus no teem Laudim
no ikweenas Zilts weenu Wibru
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pawehlejeet teem fazzi-
dami : xemmeetees no schenne-
nes/ no Jardanas Widdus/ ku-
to Preestexu Kahjas pastahweja-
diwipadefmits Akminans/ un ne-
feet tohs ar juns pahri / un no-
lerzeet tohs tai Mahjas-Weetā-
kur juhs par Nakti palikseet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja Josuïs toh-
diwipadefimits Wihrus/ ko winse-
bij no teem Israëta Behrneen-
eezehlis/ no ikweenas Zilts weenu-
Wibru/ un Josuïs fazzija ue-
teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eite pahri / preeksch ta
Schkirstu ta KUNGA juhf-
Deewa/ Jardanas Widdū / un-
pazel
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
